name: IRS User Fee Exemption for Small Business Pension Plans

eligibility.description: Applies to eligible employers with at least one non-highly compensated employee during the first five years of the plan's existence.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Small businesses can avoid paying IRS user fees for determination letters regarding the qualified status of a new pension, profit-sharing, or 401(k) plan.
